```{r}
sfiimpprcR1 <- FeatureImp$new(sfipredR1, loss = auprcloss, compare = "difference", n.repetitions = 1000)

sfiimpprcplotR1 <- plot(sfiimpprcR1)

pdf(file.path(outdir, "R1FeatureImpsPRC.pdf"), width = 5.1, height = 4)
sfiimpprcplotR1 +
  ggtitle("Supplemental Figure 2B") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = expression("Feature Importance (Loss: 1 - AU"[PRC]*")"), 
                     limits = c(-0.02, 0.10), 
                     breaks = c(0.00, 0.02, 0.04, 0.06, 0.08, 0.10)) +
  scale_y_discrete(name = NULL, labels = dfR1labs) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 13.5),      
    axis.text = element_text(size = 13.5))

sfiimpprcR1res <- sfiimpprcR1$results
sfiimpprcR1res
write.csv(sfiimpprcR1res, file.path(outdir, "MIDUS R1 SFI10 FeatureImpPRC.csv"), row.names = TRUE)

#######################
#social predictors#
#######################
set.seed(555)
socimpprcR1 <- FeatureImp$new(socpredR1, loss = auprcloss, compare = "difference", n.repetitions = 1000)

socimpprcplotR1 <- plot(socimpprcR1)

socimpprcplotR1 +
  ggtitle("Supplemental Figure 2C") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = expression("Feature Importance (Loss: 1 - AU"[PRC]*")"), 
                     limits = c(-0.02, 0.06), 
                     breaks = c(0.00, 0.02, 0.04, 0.06)) + 
  scale_y_discrete(name = NULL, labels = dfR1labs) +
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14), axis.title = element_text(size = 13.5),      
    axis.text = element_text(size = 13.5))

dev.off()

socimpprcR1res <- socimpprcR1$results
socimpprcR1res
write.csv(socimpprcR1res, file.path(outdir, "MIDUS R1 SFI8 FeatureImpPRC.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
```


# Criterion testing

The following, in tandem, produce the results presented in Table 2.

### SFI-10 criterion

```{r}
######################
#only with CIs#
######################
mpqposR1 <- c("mpq_wellbeing_R1", "mpq_socpotency_R1", "mpq_achieve_R1", "mpq_socclose_R1")
mpqnegR1 <- c("mpq_stressreact_R1", "mpq_aggression_R1", "mpq_alienation_R1")

allvars <- c("health_R1", "mehealth_R1", "badl_R1", "iadl_R1", pwbR1, swbR1, "affpos_R1", 
             "affneg_R1", mpqposR1, mpqnegR1,
             "fmly_affectsolidarity_R1", "frnd_affectsolidarity_R1")


corrtablenop <- function(vars, targetvar, data) {
  results <- data.frame(
    variable = character(),
    mean_sd = character(),
    rho = character(),
    z = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for (var in vars) {
    spearman_corr <- cor(data[[targetvar]], data[[var]], method = "spearman")
    
    z <- 0.5 * log((1 + spearman_corr) / (1 - spearman_corr))
    
    sez <- 1 / sqrt(length(data[[targetvar]]) - 3)
    zlo <- z - qnorm(0.975) * sez
    zhi <- z + qnorm(0.975) * sez
    
    rholo <- (exp(2 * zlo) - 1) / (exp(2 * zlo) + 1)
    rhohi <- (exp(2 * zhi) - 1) / (exp(2 * zhi) + 1)
    
    rhocistr <- sprintf("%.2f [%.2f, %.2f]", spearman_corr, rholo, rhohi)
    rhocistr <- sub("^0\\.", ".", rhocistr)
    
    meanv <- mean(data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE)
    sdv <- sd(data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE)
    meansdstr <- sprintf("%.2f (%.2f)", meanv, sdv)
    
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
      variable = var,
      mean_sd = meansdstr,
      rho = rhocistr,
      z = z
    ))
  }
  
  #apa#
  results$z <- round(results$z, 2)
  
  return(results)
}

#save#
sfiallcors <- corrtablenop(allvars, "SFIlp", data = dfR1)
write.csv(sfiallcors, file.path(outdir, "R1sfiallcorrs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

### SFI-8 criterion

```{r}
#corvars#
allvars <- c("health_R1", "mehealth_R1", "badl_R1", "iadl_R1", pwbR1, swbR1, 
             "affpos_R1", "affneg_R1", mpqposR1, mpqnegR1,
             "fmly_affectsolidarity_R1", "frnd_affectsolidarity_R1")

#save#
sfisocallcors <- corrtablenop(allvars, "socSFIlp", data = dfR1)
write.csv(sfisocallcors, file.path(outdir, "R1SFI8socallcorrs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

### SFI-10 and SFI-8 different?

```{r}
lessvars <- c("health_R1", "mehealth_R1", pwbR1, swbR1, "affpos_R1", mpqposR1, 
              "fmly_affectsolidarity_R1", "frnd_affectsolidarity_R1")
greatervars <- c("affneg_R1", mpqnegR1, "badl_R1", "iadl_R1")

r_kh <- cor(dfR1$socSFIlp, dfR1$SFIlp, method = "spearman")
n <- nrow(dfR1)

comparecortable <- function(vars, data, alternative) {
  results <- data.frame(
    variable = character(),
    rho_socSFIlp = numeric(),
    rho_SFIlp = numeric(),
    p_value = numeric(),
    alternative = character(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  for (var in vars) {
    r_jk <- cor(data[[var]], data$socSFIlp, method = "spearman")
    r_jh <- cor(data[[var]], data$SFIlp, method = "spearman")
    
    result <- cocor.dep.groups.overlap(
      r.jk = r_jk, 
      r.jh = r_jh, 
      r.kh = r_kh, 
      n = n, 
      alternative = alternative,
      alpha = 0.05,
      conf.level = 0.95
    )
    
    results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
      variable = var,
      rho_SFIlp = round(r_jh, 3),
      rho_socSFIlp = round(r_jk, 3),
      p_value = round(result@steiger1980$p.value, 4),
      alternative = alternative
    ))
  }
  
  return(results)
}

#less#
lesstestcors <- comparecortable(lessvars, dfR1, alternative = "less")

#greater#
greatertestcors <- comparecortable(greatervars, dfR1, alternative = "greater")

#combine
alltestcors <- rbind(lesstestcors, greatertestcors)

alltestcors$p_value_adj <- p.adjust(alltestcors$p_value, method = "BH")

print(alltestcors)
write.csv(alltestcors, file.path(outdir, "R1sfitestcorss.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```


### Age + criterion checks

```{r}
#corvars#
allvars <- c("health_R1", "mehealth_R1", "badl_R1", "iadl_R1", pwbR1, swbR1, 
             "affpos_R1", "affneg_R1", mpqposR1, mpqnegR1,
             "fmly_affectsolidarity_R1", "frnd_affectsolidarity_R1")

#save#
ageallcors <- corrtablenop(allvars, "age", data = dfR1)
write.csv(ageallcors, file.path(outdir, "R1ageallcorrs.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```


# Correlations between age + SFI vars

```{r}
#######################
#need to recode variables first so that higher value#
#direction associated with mortality in SFI#
#######################
colnames(dfR1oc)[c(5:11, 50:52)] <- c("sex", "age", "neighborhood", "financial_control", 
                                      "freq_children", "activities_youth", "work", "volunteering", 
                                      "feel_isolated", "courtresp")
#age#
#no change#

#sex#
dfR1oc$sex <- as.numeric(dfR1oc$sex)

#neighborhood clean?#
#no change#
table(dfR1oc$neighborhood)

#financial control#
#REVERSE 0-10#
table(dfR1oc$financial_control)
dfR1oc$financial_control <- 10 - dfR1oc$financial_control
table(dfR1oc$financial_control)

#family contact#
#no change#
table(dfR1oc$freq_children)

#friend contact#
#no change#
table(dfR1oc$activities_youth)

#work#
#REVERSE 0-1#
table(dfR1oc$work)
dfR1oc$work <- 1 - dfR1oc$work
table(dfR1oc$work)

#volunteer#
#no change#

#feel isolated#
#currently 1 = high, 13 = low#
#REVERSE 1-13#
table(dfR1oc$feel_isolated)
dfR1oc$feel_isolated <- 14 - dfR1oc$feel_isolated
table(dfR1oc$feel_isolated)

#treated courtesy/respect#
table(dfR1oc$courtresp)
dfR1oc$courtresp <- 8 - dfR1oc$courtresp
table(dfR1oc$courtresp)

#######################
#correlations of social items with age raw HRS#
#######################
ogcordfspearR1 <- dfR1oc[c(6, 7:10, 51, 52)]
view(ogcordfspearR1)
ogcordfpearR1 <- dfR1oc[c(6, 11, 50)]
view(ogcordfpearR1)

ogcordatpearR1 <- cor(ogcordfpearR1, method = "pearson")
ogcordatspearR1 <- cor(ogcordfspearR1, method = "spearman")
subsetogpearR1 <- ogcordatpearR1["age", ,drop = FALSE]
subsetogspearR1 <- ogcordatspearR1["age", ,drop = FALSE]

ogcordR1 <- cbind(subsetogpearR1, subsetogspearR1)
ogcordatR1 <- as.data.frame(ogcordR1)
ogcordatR1 <- ogcordatR1[, c("age", "age", "freq_children", "activities_youth", "volunteering", 
                          "feel_isolated", "neighborhood", "financial_control", "courtresp", 
                          "work")]
ogcordatR1 <- ogcordatR1[, c(-2)]
ogcordatR1 <- as.matrix(ogcordatR1)
colnames(ogcordatR1) <- dfR1labs[colnames(ogcordatR1)]
rownames(ogcordatR1) <- dfR1labs[rownames(ogcordatR1)]

#visualize#
png(file.path(outdir, "R1agesocialitemscors.png"), width = 9, height = 9, units = "in", res = 600)
socogplot <- corrplot(t(ogcordatR1), method = "color", addCoef.col = "#000000", 
                      col = colorRampPalette(c("#6A4C93", "white", "#27933E"))(200),  
                      col.lim = c(-1, 1), tl.cex = 1.4, tl.col = "grey30", 
                      cl.pos = 'n', number.cex = 1)
dev.off()

#######################
#following up on positive correlations#
#######################
#volunteering#
cor.test(dfR1oc$age, dfR1oc$volunteering, alternative = "greater", 
         method = "pearson", exact = NULL, conf.level = 0.95)

#working
cor.test(dfR1oc$age, dfR1oc$work, alternative = "greater", 
         method = "pearson", exact = NULL, conf.level = 0.95)
```
